Landing.eyebrow: Your organization, available to your AIs
Landing.title: Turn intention into action.
Landing.subtitle: Lownheur brings your categories, events, goals and schedules together. Manage them from a clear dashboard or directly from your AI through MCP.
Landing.featuresSubtitle: What you organize visually is immediately available to the tools you authorize.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Structure every area of your life in a clear, illustrated space.

events.title: Events
events.description: Keep what needs to happen with the right context and no clutter.

goals.title: Goals
goals.description: Track your intentions from the first idea to the achieved result.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.description: Place events in time and link them to the goals they advance.

Landing.pricingSubtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when your usage makes it worthwhile.
Landing.mcpSubtitle: A remote MCP endpoint, compact tools and the same permissions as your dashboard.

clients.chatgpt: Connect Lownheur and manage your organization directly in a conversation.
clients.claude: Add the remote server to compatible integrations and keep control.
clients.mcp: Use any compatible MCP client with authentication tied to your account.

categories.emptyHint: Add your first category to start organizing your workspace.

OAuth.title: Authorize {client}?
OAuth.description: This application is requesting access to your Lownheur workspace.
OAuth.permissionsTitle: This connection will be able to:

permissions.resources: Read your categories, events, goals and schedules.
permissions.mutate: Create, update and delete the same data when you ask it to.

OAuth.warning: Only authorize applications you trust. You can revoke this access at any time from AI connections.

errors.invalid_request: The authorization request is invalid or expired.
errors.decision_failed: Your decision could not be saved. Try again.

Mcp.title: Connect your AIs to Lownheur
Mcp.description: One remote MCP endpoint, the same business rules as the dashboard and revocable access for every application.
Mcp.oauthReady: The OAuth server is responding for your account. Final compatibility will be confirmed after deployment.
Mcp.oauthSetup: The owner still needs to enable the Supabase OAuth server and apply the migration before the first connection.

chatgpt.title: ChatGPT
chatgpt.step1: In ChatGPT web, enable developer mode when it is available for your plan and workspace.
chatgpt.step2: In Settings > Apps > Create, enter {endpoint}, select OAuth and scan the tools.
chatgpt.step3: Connect your Lownheur account, review the 33 tools and confirm write actions when ChatGPT asks.

claude.title: Claude
claude.step1: Open integrations in a Claude client that supports remote MCP servers.
claude.step2: Add {endpoint} as a remote HTTP server with OAuth authentication.
claude.step3: Authorize Lownheur in the window that opens, then test a read operation first.

generic.title: MCP client
generic.step1: Use a client compatible with Streamable HTTP and OAuth 2.1 with PKCE.
generic.step3: Authorize your account and review permissions before any mutation.

Mcp.grantsDescription: Revoking access invalidates its refresh tokens and OAuth sessions.
Mcp.emptyDescription: Your connections will appear here after their first authorization.

errors.revoke_failed: The connection could not be revoked.

Usage.title: Usage and plan
Usage.description: Track your limits and manage your Lownheur subscription in one place.
Usage.stripeSetup: Payments will be available as soon as the Stripe credentials are configured.
Usage.monthlyReset: The MCP counter resets every UTC calendar month.
Usage.storageLive: Storage is recalculated after every image upload or deletion.
Usage.offersDescription: Plan changes and cancellations are then managed in the secure Stripe portal.

messages.checkoutSuccess: Payment confirmed. The plan will update as soon as the Stripe webhook is received.
messages.checkoutCancelled: Checkout was cancelled and no change was applied.

errors.not_configured: Stripe still needs to be configured by the owner.
errors.billing_failed: Billing could not be opened. Try again.
errors.no_customer: No Stripe billing customer is associated yet.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: This page does not exist or has moved. Return to the Lownheur home page.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: How Lownheur collects, uses and protects your data.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: The data controller is {legalName}, located at {legalAddress}. Contact: {supportEmail}.

data.title: Data we process
data.body: We process account and profile data, the categories, events, goals, schedules and images you provide, Stripe billing identifiers and limited technical logs. Lownheur does not store payment card numbers.

purposes.title: Purposes
purposes.body: This data is used to provide and secure the service, isolate user workspaces, enforce quotas, manage billing, answer support requests and diagnose incidents.

legalBases.title: Legal bases
legalBases.body: Account and service processing is necessary to perform the contract. Security and abuse prevention rely on our legitimate interests. Billing and accounting retention meet legal obligations.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Functional data is kept for the life of the account and deleted when you delete it, subject to technical backup windows and legal retention requirements for invoices, disputes and security logs.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Under applicable data protection law, you may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, objection or portability by contacting {supportEmail}. You may also complain to your supervisory authority.

security.title: Security and processors
security.body: Lownheur uses Supabase for authentication, database and storage, Stripe for payments and Vercel for web hosting. Access is scoped per user, media is private and secrets stay server-side.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.description: The rules governing use of the Lownheur service.

service.title: Service
service.body: Lownheur provides a web interface and MCP server for organizing categories, events, goals and schedules. The service may change for security, compliance or improvement reasons.

account.title: Account
account.body: You must provide a valid email address, protect your authentication methods and remain responsible for actions taken from your account and for MCP applications you authorize.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: You may not bypass quotas or security, access another person's data, disrupt the service or store unlawful content. Access may be suspended in case of serious risk or abuse.

subscriptions.title: Plans and payment
subscriptions.body: Paid plans are monthly and renew automatically until cancelled. The price, currency and applicable taxes are shown before confirmation in Stripe Checkout. Refund policy: {refundPolicy}.

cancellation.title: Cancellation and withdrawal
cancellation.body: You can manage or cancel the subscription in the Stripe portal. Its effective date is shown in your workspace. Deleting the account stops the subscription. Any mandatory consumer rights, including a statutory withdrawal right where applicable, remain unaffected.

liability.title: Availability and liability
liability.body: We aim to provide a reliable service but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. You remain responsible for reviewing actions requested from an AI and for your own important backups. Nothing limits a right that cannot legally be limited.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: Material changes will be announced before they take effect where required by law. Contract contact: {supportEmail}.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.description: Identification of Lownheur's publisher and hosting.

publisher.title: Publisher
publisher.body: Lownheur is published by {legalName}, {legalAddress}. Registration or identifier: {registration}.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: The Lownheur name, interface and original content are protected. You retain rights to the data and images you add and grant us only the technical rights necessary to provide the service.

support.title: Support
support.description: Get help or report a problem with Lownheur.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: Send your request to {supportEmail} from the email address associated with the account. Never send your password or a Supabase or Stripe secret key.

response.title: Useful information
response.body: Include the affected page, approximate time, expected behavior and error message. Avoid including personal data or private resource content.

security.title: Security incident
security.body: For a vulnerability or suspicious access, use {supportEmail} with subject SECURITY. Do not exploit the issue beyond what is needed to describe it.

accountDeletion.title: Account deletion
accountDeletion.body: Self-service deletion is available under Dashboard > Settings. It deletes the account, resources and media, revokes sessions and stops the associated Stripe subscription.
